description_long: This object is a simplified, low-detail representation of an airplane, depicted as a flat, rectangular surface with a small, centrally placed image or decal that appears to show an aircraft. The main body is a uniform, matte gray slab with no visible three-dimensional features such as wings, engines, or landing gear. The only distinguishing element is the rectangular image, which is slightly offset from the center and contains a visual of an airplane in flight. There are no discernible textures, panel lines, or surface details on the main body. The object lacks any visible openings, windows, or interactive components. Its overall appearance is abstract and minimalistic, resembling a display board or a flat sign rather than a functional aircraft.
description: A flat, gray rectangular slab with a small, centrally placed airplane image, lacking any three-dimensional airplane features. The object is minimalistic and abstract, resembling a display board.
description_view_0: From this view, the flat gray surface is prominent, with the airplane image visible near the center top edge.
description_view_1: The airplane image appears elongated due to perspective, positioned centrally on the flat surface.
description_view_2: The rectangular image is visible closer to the left side, with the rest of the surface remaining featureless.
description_view_3: The airplane image is now near the top center, with the rest of the slab showing a uniform gray color.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: No visible wingspan or configuration; only a flat surface with an airplane image.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines; only a flat surface with an airplane image.
attribute_tail_design: No visible tail design; only a flat surface with an airplane image.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; only a flat surface with an airplane image.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit; only a flat surface with an airplane image.
